auth.loginDescription: Access your personal finance dashboard and continue tracking your money clearly.
auth.registerDescription: Set up your workspace so you can track income, expenses, and balances in one place.
auth.signInError: Unable to sign in right now. Please try again.
auth.registerError: Unable to create your account right now. Please try again.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.heroTitle: Track every move your money makes with calm, clarity, and control.

dashboard.title: Welcome back, {username}
dashboard.description: Today is {date}. Keep an eye on your balances and jump into the next transaction quickly.
dashboard.accountScopeDescription: Filter dashboard summary and recent activity by a specific account, or keep the full picture.
dashboard.summaryDescription: Live summary synced to your current account scope.
dashboard.loadErrorDescription: The dashboard summary could not be loaded right now. Try again in a moment.
dashboard.recentDescription: Your latest account activity at a glance.
dashboard.recentLoadError: Recent transactions could not be loaded right now.
dashboard.recentEmpty: No recent transactions for the selected scope yet.
dashboard.topAccountsDescription: Highest balances across your active accounts.
dashboard.accountsLoadError: Top accounts could not be loaded right now.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.description: Track, filter, and manage your complete cash flow history.
transactions.createDescription: Record a new income or expense transaction using your active accounts and categories.
transactions.dateInfo: Transaction date editing still depends on a backend update. New transactions are currently saved with the server timestamp.
transactions.noActiveAccounts: You need at least one active account before saving a transaction.
transactions.noMatchingCategories: You need an active category that matches the selected transaction type.
transactions.filtersDescription: Use keyword, account, type, category, and date range to narrow your transaction history.
transactions.tableDescription: Review, filter, and manage your paginated transaction history here.
transactions.loadErrorDescription: The transaction list could not be loaded right now. Try again in a moment.
transactions.emptyDescription: No transactions match the current filters yet.
transactions.editUnavailable: Transaction editing needs a backend update endpoint before it can be enabled.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: Manage active and inactive money sources without losing historical transactions.
accounts.openingBalanceHint: Set the initial amount for this account. Current balance will change with transactions.
accounts.searchDescription: Filter your accounts by name and status to find the right balance source quickly.
accounts.createDescription: Create a new money source with its starting balance.
accounts.editDescription: Update the account name while keeping its transaction history intact.
accounts.emptyDescription: Create your first account so transactions and dashboard balances have a real source of truth.
accounts.loadErrorDescription: The account list could not be loaded right now. Try again in a moment.
accounts.deactivateDescription: {name} will stay visible in historical transactions but can no longer be used for new ones.
accounts.deactivateHistoryHint: This keeps your old transaction history intact while preventing the account from being selected in new transactions.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Organize income and expense groups with active and inactive visibility.
categories.searchDescription: Filter categories by name, type, and status to keep your transaction forms clean.
categories.tableDescription: Manage category names, types, and active states from one place.
categories.createDescription: Create a new category for income or expense transactions.
categories.editDescription: Update the category details without breaking historical transactions.
categories.emptyDescription: Create your first category so income and expense transactions can be classified properly.
categories.loadErrorDescription: The category list could not be loaded right now. Try again in a moment.
categories.deactivateDescription: {name} will stay visible in historical transactions but can no longer be used for new ones.
categories.deactivateHistoryHint: This keeps your old transaction history intact while preventing the category from being selected in new transactions.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your account details, password, and session settings.
profile.profileInfoDescription: Username and email will stay in sync with global sidebar identity.
profile.changePasswordDescription: Current password, new password, and confirm password live here.
profile.passwordHint: Use at least 8 characters for your new password.
profile.loadErrorDescription: Your profile details could not be loaded right now. Try again in a moment.
